title: Worked Examples Effect
script_summary: Explore the science behind the worked examples effect and its impact on learning.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about the worked examples effect than social media does.
The worked examples effect suggests people learn better from guided examples than from solving problems alone.
It’s like having a map versus wandering aimlessly. Which would you choose?
Studies show worked examples not only save time but reduce cognitive load, making learning easier.
So, if you want to learn effectively, start with examples. It’s science!
Curious for more science insights? Follow for more!
